title: jacobaea erucifolia subsp. praealta
intro: Jacobaea erucifolia subsp. praealta, also known as burnet-saxifrage or burnet, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight bacterial infections. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as wound healing, reduced pain, and improved immune function. Jacobaea erucifolia subsp. praealta can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or topical cream, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
